seoTitle: Clarence Town vs Clarenza — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clarence Town and Clarenza. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clarence Town vs Clarenza: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clarence Town and Clarenza.
heading: Clarence Town vs Clarenza — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clarence Town, New South Wales and Clarenza, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clarenza has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Clarence Town (50/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clarence Town or Clarenza safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clarence Town has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Clarenza scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clarence Town scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Clarenza scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clarence Town or Clarenza?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clarenza has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 3.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
